title: Extracting Relevant Keywords from an Article
scenario: Write a prompt that gets an LLM to extract 5-7 relevant keywords from a given article about machine learning. The extracted keywords should be specific to the topic and not too generic. Use a simple tone and provide the article text.

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the generated keywords meet the quantity and tone requirements.
Evaluates the relevance of the extracted keywords to the article's content.
Verifies the extracted keywords are specific to the machine learning topic.
